_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to help create a short text that captures one idea.

_source.w: We are learning to help create a short text that captures one idea.
y: Recording our ideas is the beginning of writing.
When we put our ideas into a text, other people can see what we think.
Every idea we record shows that our thoughts matter.
eg: We make marks or choose letters to put our name on a piece of work.
We select a picture to go with a sentence about our day.
We help decide what a class text should say about our experience.
We choose a word or symbol to add to a shared text.
We use a device to type one word that captures our idea.
We draw a picture that shows our idea and watch the teacher write words beside it.
